ksa_text: Ability to monitor emerging regulatory requirements and assess the impact of regulatory changes on organizational compliance posture and strategic priorities.

dcwf.top_element_label: Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment process and assess risk mitigation efforts.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Define and/or implement policies and procedures to enable an AI risk assessment process and assess risk mitigation efforts.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Regulatory Compliance falls outside the primary competency scope of the VP Data Architecture. This ability KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Regulatory Compliance truly out-of-scope for the VP Data Architecture? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Regulatory Compliance as a core or recommended competency for the VP Data Architecture. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Regulatory Compliance falls outside the established competency profile for the VP Data Architecture. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Regulatory Compliance is outside the competency scope of the VP Data Architecture. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
